task_completion.description: Open the initial SLA draft document
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer (or a similar word processor) is open, and the title bar or document text indicates 'SLA_Draft_Sentinels.odt' is loaded with the original bracketed placeholders visible.

task_completion.description: Define the four required User Fields and their values
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Fields' or 'Variables' dialog box is visible showing the creation of User Fields: 'ClientName' (Omicron Industries), 'ContractDate' (October 1, 2025), 'UptimeTarget' (99.99%), and 'ServiceCredit' (25%).

task_completion.description: Replace client placeholders with the ClientName field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[CLIENT]' or '[CLIENT NAME]' is replaced by 'Omicron Industries'. The replacement should ideally show field shading (a gray background behind the text) indicating it is a dynamic field.

task_completion.description: Replace date placeholders with the ContractDate field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[DATE]' or '[START DATE]' is replaced by 'October 1, 2025', ideally with field shading.

task_completion.description: Replace uptime and credit placeholders with their respective fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[UPTIME]' is replaced by '99.99%' and '[CREDIT]' is replaced by '25%', ideally with field shading.

task_completion.description: Save the document with the new filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'SLA_Omicron_Final.odt' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the application title bar updates to show 'SLA_Omicron_Final.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor's GUI to define fields and replace text
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer menus (e.g., Insert -> Field -> More Fields, Edit -> Find and Replace) rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual User Fields rather than just typing the replacement text
integrity.visual_evidence: The replaced text has a gray background (field shading) typical of word processor fields, or the 'Fields' dialog is explicitly shown being used to insert the variables into the document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to manipulate the .odt archive directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown running python scripts, sed, or zip/unzip commands to modify the content.xml of the .odt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/SLA_Draft_Sentinels.odt. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/SLA_Omicron_Final.odt. Variables to define: ClientName (Omicron Industries), ContractDate (October 1, 2025), UptimeTarget (99.99%), ServiceCredit (25%). Note: The original document only contains '[CLIENT]' in uppercase (not '[Client]'), and there are exactly 6 placeholders in total to be replaced.
